title: Tamil Nadu BJP Leaders Meet Home Minister Amit Shah In Delhi | Tamil Nadu Politics News | News18
description: | | Tamil Nadu BJP core committee meets Amit Shah in DelhiA key political meeting took place in New Delhi as senior leaders of the Tamil Nadu BJP core committee met Amit Shah to discuss the party's future strategy in the state.The high-level interaction has triggered speculation over organizational changes, electoral planning, alliance dynamics, and the BJP's roadmap for expanding its footprint in Tamil Nadu.
